query:
WITH message AS (
                SELECT id
                FROM comms_messages
                WHERE id = $2 AND channel_id = $1
            ),
            inserted AS (
                INSERT INTO comms_reactions (message_id, emoji, user_id)
                SELECT id, $3, $4
                FROM message
                ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
            )
            SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM message) AS "exists!"
